title: Slite API Vocabulary
description: Terms, concepts, and operations defined in the Slite Public API

terms.description:
Owner of the note for review purposes.
Either userId or groupId will be set, but not both.
Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Ask a question to your notes in natural language.
The scope of the notes used to answer the question is restricted to the authenticated user.
Various optional filters are available to restrict the scope of the notes even more.

Create a note from markdown content, with a templateId or just an empty one.
If no parentNoteId is specified, it will be created in your personal channel.
Delete a custom content from AskX usage.
Delete a note and its children by id. !!! It's irreversible !!!
Set Outdated status on a note with optional reason
Get a group by ID
Return a note by id
Return note children by parent note id
Get a user by ID
Index a custom content for AskX usage.
List custom content ids from AskX usage.
List empty notes for knowledge management.
List inactive notes for knowledge management.
List notes with optional filtering by owner
List notes for knowledge management.
List public notes for knowledge management.
Return authenticated user information.
Search for groups by name

Search notes based on a query.
The scope of the notes is restricted to the authenticated user.
Various optional filters are available to restrict the scope of the search even more.
Search for users by email, name, or username
Update note content with markdown and/or title
Update the archived state of a note
Update the owner of a note, it can be a user or a group

Update or create tile.
A tile is rendered with a structured header and a markdown content.
You can create a tile by copying a tile id from Slite by clicking on `Copy block id` on an empty line setting in the editor.
Set Verified status on a note with optional verification expiration
